rawAssistant: A hasty departure before dawn, eh? If you're planning to set out early, make sure to double-check your lanterns and oil flasks. Don't want them failing you in the misty darkness of Hollowfen's north road. A reliable light source can mean the difference between finding a safe haven and stumbling into trouble.
